missed_changes: Strong new emphasis on AI + crypto convergence (decentralized compute for ML) — leading Gensyn's Series A and 'collective AI' framing
Active deployment/leading new deals through the window (Alongside seed, Gensyn Series A, continued LayerZero support) — concretely 'building through the winter'
Explicit pro-multi-chain / cross-chain interoperability stance (LayerZero; 'future of crypto is multi-chain') paired with opposing Uniswap deployment on BNB Chain via Wormhole
Recurring cultural/political commentary on innovation, science funding mechanisms, and societal hostility to builders — outside the market-view frame
notes: The infrastructure-through-the-winter thesis is strongly confirmed via concrete deals (Gensyn = decentralized compute, Iron Fish + Boneh ZK discussion, NEAR/LayerZero modular & multi-chain infra, cdixon 'Read Write Own' ownership economy, prtyDAO). Risk stance confirmed by active capital deployment. The concern-side claims (CeFi custodians, algo stablecoins, exchange tokens) and self-custody/AA were simply not addressed in the provided statements — marked absent, not contradicted. Most notable unanticipated thread is the AI+crypto compute angle, which partly overlaps the decentralized-infra claim but reads as a distinct new emphasis.
